text:
FlowBlinq GEO doesn't have an Enterprise plan. The highest tier available is **Pro** at **$30/month**, which includes:

- **3,000 pages/month** to audit
- **Daily crawl frequency** (most flexible scheduling)
- **All features**: unlimited audits, page selection, bulk uploads, citation monitoring, and competitive intelligence

Here's the full lineup:

| Plan | Price | Pages/month | Crawl Frequency |
|------|-------|-------------|-----------------|
| **Free** | $0 | 20 pages | One-time |
| **Starter** | $10/month | 500 pages | Manual or Monthly |
| **Growth** | $20/month | 1,500 pages | Manual/Weekly/Monthly |
| **Pro** | $30/month | 3,000 pages | Manual/Daily/Weekly/Monthly |

You can also buy **one-time credits** (100 credits for $10) if you prefer pay-as-you-go instead of a subscription.

**Annual billing gets 20% off** any monthly plan.

Are you looking to upgrade your example.com site, or need help understanding what pages/month you'd need?
